EmptyState.title: No games found
EmptyState.description: Try adjusting your filters or run a scan to import your ROM collection.

CookieConsent.description: We use a session cookie for admin access and, with your consent, analytics cookies to understand how the library is used.

ScanPanel.title: ROM Scanner
ScanPanel.description: Scans configured paths and imports new ROM files into the library.

MetadataBatch.title: Auto Metadata Fetch
MetadataBatch.description: Searches RAWG for every game without metadata and auto-applies matches above {threshold}% confidence. Results between {review}%–{max}% are flagged for manual review.

SettingsForm.title: Settings
SettingsForm.platformsDesc: Configure scan paths, extensions and scan mode for each platform.
SettingsForm.noPaths: No paths configured — platform will be skipped during scan.
SettingsForm.rawgKeyDesc: Used for auto-fetching game metadata, covers and descriptions.
SettingsForm.sgdbDesc: Integrated game cover search. Purpose-built database for video game artwork, free with registration.
SettingsForm.youtubeDesc: Powers the integrated YouTube trailer search in the game editor. If left blank, reuses the Google API Key above (same project, just enable YouTube Data API v3 in Google Cloud).
SettingsForm.youtubeKeyOptional: (optional — falls back to Google API Key)
SettingsForm.youtubeKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to reuse Google API Key above…
SettingsForm.appUrlDesc: Public URL of the app, used for iframes and shared links.
SettingsForm.s3Desc: Cover art is stored in MinIO. The internal endpoint is used by the backend to upload; the public endpoint is used by browsers to display images.
SettingsForm.s3PublicHint: URL accessible from the browser, e.g. https://s3.yourdomain.com
SettingsForm.s3RegionHint: MinIO/S3 region. Leave blank for the default (us-east-1). Change if MinIO returns a region mismatch error.
SettingsForm.downloadQueueDesc: Maximum simultaneous downloads allowed at the same time. Users beyond this limit are placed in a queue.
SettingsForm.shopDesc: Exposes your Switch library as a compatible HTTP shop. Only accessible from devices on the same local network.
SettingsForm.shopPasswordHint: If set, CyberFoil will prompt for credentials. Username can be anything; only the password is checked.
SettingsForm.shopStep2: Set Protocol: http · Host: <raspberry-ip> · Port: 3000 · Path: /api/shop

DonationSettings.title: Donations
DonationSettings.description: Configure donation links shown on the public /donate page. Leave empty to hide a method.
DonationSettings.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Thanks for supporting the server!
DonationSettings.notConfigured: No donation methods configured — the /donate page will show a placeholder.

Donate.title: Support the project
Donate.defaultMessage: If you enjoy using GameHub, consider buying me a coffee ☕
Donate.footer: 100% optional · no account needed · thank you ♥

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: This policy explains what data GameHub collects, why, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the ePrivacy Directive.
Privacy.s1Body: This GameHub instance is operated by the site owner as a private, self-hosted service. It is not operated by a company, and no personal data is shared with or sold to any third party, except where explicitly stated below.
Privacy.s3Intro: The following data is logged server-side when you interact with GameHub. This is equivalent to a standard web server access log and is processed under the basis of legitimate interest (security, abuse prevention, operational monitoring).
Privacy.s5Contact: To exercise any right, contact the site owner directly.
Privacy.s6Body: All data is stored locally in an SQLite database on the server. Admin access is protected by a password-based session. The session cookie is marked HttpOnly and SameSite=Lax. No data is transmitted to external parties beyond the services listed in section 4.
Privacy.s7Body: If this policy changes materially, the "Last updated" date above will be revised. Continued use of GameHub after a policy change constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
Privacy.rightAccessDesc: You can ask what data is held about your IP / session.
Privacy.rightErasureDesc: You can request deletion of your request logs, search logs and geo-cache entry.
Privacy.rightObjectDesc: You can object to analytics processing by selecting "Necessary only" in the cookie banner.
Privacy.rightWithdrawDesc: Clear the gh_consent_v1 key from your browser's localStorage at any time to reset your choice.

Traffic.title: Traffic Analysis
Traffic.subtitle: Live data every 3s · stats every 30s · {n} connection active now
Traffic.subtitlePlural: Live data every 3s · stats every 30s · {n} connections active now
Traffic.downloadAnalyticsSub: Which games and from which devices
Traffic.downloadsByDeviceSub: Top 8 games · stacked by device type
Traffic.noSuspicious: No suspicious activity detected in the last hour

Donations.title: Donations
Donations.subtitle: All-time donation history and stats
Donations.webhookSetupDesc: Ko-fi can automatically record donations here. Go to your Ko-fi account → Settings → API and set the webhook URL below. Copy your Verification Token from that page and paste it here.
Donations.emptyHistory: No donations yet. Add one manually or set up the Ko-fi webhook.

AdminGraveyard.title: Missing Games
AdminGraveyard.subtitle: Games that were present in a previous scan but are no longer found on disk.
AdminGraveyard.emptySubtitle: No missing games detected. Everything is accounted for 🎉
AdminGraveyard.confirmDelete: Permanently remove this game from the library? This cannot be undone.
AdminGraveyard.purgeConfirm: This will permanently delete all {count} missing games from the database. Are you sure?
AdminGraveyard.recoverConfirm: This will automatically recover metadata from missing games that have the same file hash (SHA256). Files must be identical. Continue?
AdminGraveyard.recoverError: Recovery failed. Check browser console for details.

GameEditor.trailerNoResults: No results. Try a different query.
GameEditor.trailerSearchHint: Type a search query and press Enter

MetadataFetch.slugHint: Direct lookup by RAWG slug — bypasses search ranking
MetadataFetch.noResultsHint: Try pasting the RAWG URL directly:

CoverUploader.noCoversForGame: No covers found for this game
